title: boerhavia paniculata var. cordobensis
intro: Boerhavia paniculata var. cordobensis is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family, commonly known as the four o'clock plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Boerhavia paniculata var. cordobensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune system function. Boerhavia paniculata var. cordobensis is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in some herbal remedies, such as capsules or tinctures.
